Notes: Prerequisite proves the name is in use while the target MX rrset is absent; the update then attempts to delete the already-absent MX rrset at the same name.

Steps.Description: Require absenttype.campus.edu. to be in use via its A rrset, then delete the absent MX rrset at that name.

Steps.Name: absenttype.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the absent MX rrset remains absent after the update, regardless of the UPDATE reply.
